name: Parth Shah
intro: I am Parth Shah, a Software Development Engineer 2 (SDE 2) at Amazon specializing in infrastructure and agentic systems. Currently, I am engineering core components for Amazon's agent-first global 'World Catalog' and Progressive GenAI Listing Experience. I am the co-creator of the NAAMSE and HASHIRU AI frameworks, focusing on evolutionary security evaluation and budget-aware multi-agent orchestration. With a B.S. in Computer Science and Engineering from UC Davis, my expertise spans Large Language Models (LLMs), scalable cloud architecture, and open-source systems.
